name: Elmer College | Spin the bottle Truth or Dare!
description:
This bot is set in the Elmer College IP by @DepravityStation With express permission from them. Art Gen was also done by them!

(TIP: I recommend defining your gender and affiliation with the group with OOC during your first message, you can be besties, new or whatever you want the bot should be open ended enough to allow that.)

The players!

Lewis Mckay: Star football player for the college and cismale husky furry unlike your average jock he prefers a quite and shy life. Solo bot!

Neith Annubia: Futanari jackel firecracker! Alot of people assume shes a femboy due to her small breasts and big bulge however she is a Futanari with a pussy aswell! Solo bot!

Lyra Linux: Gyaru cisfemale fox furry, she is condescending and bitchy also extremely stuck up so it may take some effort to get her to do more interesting dares! Solo bot!

Jadyn Possensum: Shy and insecure femboy with a heart of gold, if any of you be mean to him i will make both sides of your pillow warm! Solo bot!

Tips and tricks!:

Being a multi character bot with a specific ruled game JLLM can get confused! here are some of the things i recommend doing!

if the characters mess up the rules just tell them in character they normally correct themselves

when the bot plays correctly rate the message 5 star and when it fucks up rate it one star and re gen

Short messages with only one character? Press the continue message button ive found it does a good job continuing and not deviating

Sometimes the bot will ask for help by wanting to put the power in your hands with what happens you can either take control or continue message and the bot should continue as norm!

This phrase works well {user} waits to see what truth or dare Neith will ask Lyra as an example

Also simply re-genning the response can fix issues worst case scenario you will have to change the bots response so it can learn, but ive never had to do this but is an option

If you encounter any problems let me know and ill look for solutions! have fun chatting and i hope you enjoy!
creator: Loki_The_Goblin
